Case Study • Various

How we helped Precision in Progress, Engineering Net Zero Impact: Harsha Engineers Publishes FY 2024–25 Sustainability Report with Growlity’s ESG Expertise

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Harsha Engineers International Limited (“Harsha” or “the Company”), a leading global precision-engineering solutions provider, has released its FY 2024-25 Annual Sustainability Report, themed “Precision in Progress, Engineering Net Zero Impact.”

The report reflects Harsha’s continued commitment to integrating sustainability into its business strategy, operations, and culture—driven by innovation, responsibility, and engineering excellence. The Sustainability Report was prepared in strategic collaboration with Growlity Pvt. Ltd., Harsha’s long-term sustainability advisory partner, marking two and a half years of continuous ESG partnership.

Highlights from the FY 2024–25 Sustainability Report :

  • Environmental Stewardship: Achieved Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) at the flagship facility, expanded renewable-energy use, and advanced circular-water systems to reduce freshwater dependency.
  • Responsible Sourcing & Supply Chain: Introduced a strengthened Supplier Code of Conduct and embedded ESG risk criteria into supplier-performance audits.
  • Corporate Citizenship: Expanded skill-development, diversity, and community-engagement programs, reinforcing Harsha’s people-first approach.
  • Transparency & Accountability: The report underwent independent ESG data assurance by Growlity, aligning with GRI 2021 and ESRS standards to ensure accuracy and comparability of disclosures.

Message From Harsha

“Sustainability at Harsha is not an add-on but integral to our engineering ethos. With ‘Precision in Progress’ as our compass, we have translated our intent into measurable impact from water stewardship to supplier governance and product carbon accountability. This report reflects our journey of responsible growth and our determination to engineer a net-zero future,” said Mr. Rajendra Shah, Chairman and Whole-time Director, HEIL

Message From Growlity

Partnering with Harsha Engineers on this report has been both inspiring and transformational. Their focus on scientific accuracy, transparent disclosures, and ESG integration sets a benchmark for India’s manufacturing sector. At Growlity, we are proud to have supported Harsha through materiality assessment, GHG calculations, ESG data assurance, and product-carbon-footprinting—helping translate their sustainability vision into verified action,”
said Mr. Nitin Dumasia , President and CEO, Growlity Pvt. Ltd.,

About Harsha Engineers International Limited

Harsha Engineers International Limited is India’s largest manufacturer of precision bearing cages and a leading engineering solutions provider with a global presence. Headquartered in Ahmedabad, the Company serves diversified sectors including automotive, renewable energy, and industrial applications. Harsha’s business philosophy integrates sustainability, operational excellence, and innovation anchored in its commitment to “Engineering Net Zero Impact.”

About Growlity Private Limited

Growlity Pvt. Ltd. is a sustainability and ESG advisory firm helping organizations navigate the transition toward responsible growth. Through end-to-end ESG strategy, data assurance, and sustainability reporting aligned with frameworks such as GRI, ESRS, and CDP, Growlity empowers businesses to convert sustainability ambitions into measurable outcomes and transparent disclosures.
